description: The Maserati Quattroporte, in its fifth and sixth generations (2004-2023), combined Italian flair with four-door practicality. The fifth generation's Ferrari-derived 4.2/4.7-litre V8 with a Duo-Select semi-automatic or six-speed manual is the most characterful. The Trofeo with its 580 bhp twin-turbo V8 was the ultimate version.
